items.briefing:
A critical vulnerability nicknamed "WP2Shell" is putting millions of WordPress websites at risk of being taken over by attackers remotely — organisations running WordPress sites, including training portals or public-facing pages, should ensure plugins and core software are updated immediately. Separately, business email compromise (BEC) phishing attacks are becoming harder to detect, with criminals combining multiple evasion techniques to trick staff into transferring funds or sharing sensitive information.

Iran has also been reported using AI to accelerate cyber and influence operations, a reminder that state-sponsored threats are growing more sophisticated globally. **Practical tip:** If your organisation uses WordPress, log in today and apply any available updates to themes, plugins, and the core platform.

featured.title: Australia lags on AI governance as adoption races ahead
featured.quote: Australian organisations lag dangerously behind in AI governance as adoption accelerates rapidly.
